meaning: v.重新分类,重新安排等级
examples: The aim, allegedly, was to reclassify them as new employees.
The latitude of customs to reclassify products was also reduced.
So what makes Pluto so different that it could be um 'reclassify.
Under the VCSP, an employer agrees to prospectively reclassify workers as employees for future tax periods.
And if only some expenditure is capped, parties may reclassify spending to their advantage.
